nasb.text: Then Mordecai recorded these events, and he sent letters to all the Jews who were in all the provinces of King Ahasuerus, both near and far,

esv.text: And Mordecai recorded these things and sent letters to all the Jews who were in all the provinces of King Ahasuerus, both near and far,

cnv.text: 末底改把這些事記錄下來，並且送文書給亞哈隨魯各省遠近所有的猶大人，

ccb.text: 末底改把这些事记录下来，写信给亚哈随鲁王国内远近各省的犹太人，
